title: Verify restaurant information display
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Info' screen for 'La Carne Premium Meat'. | Verify that the restaurant name 'La Carne Premium Meat' is displayed. | Verify that the category 'Burgers, Grocery' is displayed. | Verify that the rating '4 stars out of 5 based on 2 reviews' is displayed. | Verify that the minimum order 'AED 50.00' is displayed. | Verify that the payment methods 'Visa and Mastercard' are displayed. | Verify that the city 'Abu Dhabi' is displayed. | Verify that the area 'Al Maqta' is displayed. | Verify that the status 'Open' is displayed. | Verify that the cuisines 'Burgers, Grocery' are displayed. | Verify that the opening hours '1:00PM - 6:00PM' are displayed.
expected_result: The restaurant name 'La Carne Premium Meat' is displayed. | The category 'Burgers, Grocery' is displayed. | The rating '4 stars out of 5 based on 2 reviews' is displayed. | The minimum order 'AED 50.00' is displayed. | The payment methods 'Visa and Mastercard' are displayed. | The city 'Abu Dhabi' is displayed. | The area 'Al Maqta' is displayed. | The status 'Open' is displayed. | The cuisines 'Burgers, Grocery' are displayed. | The opening hours '1:00PM - 6:00PM' are displayed.

title: Verify navigation between tabs
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Info' screen for 'La Carne Premium Meat'. | Tap on the 'MENU' tab. | Verify that the 'MENU' tab is selected. | Tap on the 'REVIEWS' tab. | Verify that the 'REVIEWS' tab is selected. | Tap on the 'INFO' tab. | Verify that the 'INFO' tab is selected.
expected_result: The 'MENU' tab is selected. | The 'REVIEWS' tab is selected. | The 'INFO' tab is selected.
